description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:unstable Docker image and runs a before_script that executes `apt update -qq` followed by `apt install -y -qq build-essential ca-certificates gobject-introspection gtk-doc-tools libgirepository1.0-dev libglib2.0-dev libsoup2.4-dev libxml2-utils meson pkg-config valac`. Define a single stage called build and add a job named build-check in this stage that runs the commands `meson -Dgtk_doc=true -Dintrospection=true -Dvapi=enabled --buildtype debug --wrap-mode=nodownload --fatal-meson-warnings --werror _build`, `ninja -C _build`, and `meson test -C _build`. Configure the build-check job to publish the artifacts located at `_build/config.h`, `_build/meson-logs/`, and `_build/docs/reference/`. No additional services, caches, or conditional rules are required.
